'''MD-5''', also called '''Emdee Five''', was an [[MD-5 medical droid]] serving the self-appointed [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Trioculus]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]].

==Biography==
MD-5 attended Trioculus at every function and was present during the latter's public address at [[Kessendra Stadium]] on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], as well as the [[whaladon-hunting submarine]] of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dunwell]]. Trioculus maintained a close relationship with MD-5, similar to the relationship shared between [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and the droid team of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

MD-5 once installed a cybernetic implant into Trioculus' fingers that enabled him to simulate the effects of [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]], and then later small fingertip-sized devices into the tips of [[Glove of Darth Vader|Darth Vader's glove]], allowing him the ability to simulate [[Telekinesis/Legends#Choking powers|Force choking]].

{{Droid-stub}}
